name: Carmilla - A Offer You Can't Refuse
description:
You were the last line of defense at a forgotten fort.

For three weeks, you held it after every surrounding stronghold had fallen. When the walls were finally breached, you did not surrender. You cut down two of Carmilla’s high-ranking generals before you were overwhelmed.

You expected death.

Instead, you were brought before her.

Carmilla has no interest in executing a capable enemy.

She is expanding her nation, and she values strength — even human strength.

Now you stand in her throne room, chained but alive, waiting to learn whether your defiance earned you punishment...

Or a far more dangerous offer.
creator: MrScaryT
